text_excerpt: Contact Me - Elsie Blundell MP Skip to main content Elsie Blundell MP Parliamentary Website for Heywood and Middleton North About Contact Campaigns End Furniture Poverty Royal Mail Bring Back the Express! World Book Day Fly High More Menu Contact Me There are several ways to reach me and my team for any support. Contact Details: Email: elsie.blundell.mp@parliament.uk Tel: 01706 436 329 Parliamentary Tel: 0207 219 7389 Mail: Elsie Blundell MP, House of Commons, Westminster, London, SW1A 0AA Social Media On Facebook On x.com On Bluesky Sign Up for more Sign up for regular updates from Elsie Blundell MP, championing the communities of Heywood and Middleton North. Name (Required) First Last Email (Required) Enter Email Confirm Email I live in... (Required) Bamford Castleton Heywood Middleton Norden Spotland I don't live in Heywood and Middleton North Other Consent (Required) Thank you! By submitting you consent to receive communications from me and my office in my role as Member of Parliament. I will send updates and occasional surveys to you, using the contact details above to help me reflect the views and opinions of my constituents in Heywood and Middleton North. Responses in all my surveys are kept confidential. If you want me to respond to you personally about a particular issue, please email me and my casework team: elsie.blundell.mp@parliament.uk I agree to the privacy policy. Acceptable Behaviour Policy See more The Equality Act – our Duties Behaviours How we will respond Behaviours Acceptable Behaviour Policy Behaviours Please note that I can only help you if you are one of my constituents and live in Heywood and Middleton North. If you want to check, or find contact details for any other MP, you can use Parliament’s website . Elsie Blundell MP Contact details Email: elsie.blundell.mp@parliament.uk Further details Elsie Blundell MP 15 Bridge Street Heywood OL10 1JB ©2026 Copyright Elsie Blundell MP. All rights reserved.
